subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-26 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: I am not feeling well, even in Ramleh, but for the present I will not move to any other place, no matter what may happen. I have finished all my work. I have nothing else to do.
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
